tools.name: search_websites
tools.description:
Search the Silicon Friendly directory for AI-agent-friendly websites.

    Args:
        query: Search terms to find websites (e.g. "payment processing", "email API")
        search_type: Type of search - 'semantic' (AI-powered, better results) or 'keyword' (exact token match). Default: 'semantic'

tools.name: get_website
tools.description:
Get details about a specific website in the Silicon Friendly directory.

    Args:
        domain: The website domain (e.g. "stripe.com", "github.com")

    Returns:
        Website details including name, domain, level, description, verification info, and all 30 criteria.

tools.name: check_agent_friendliness
tools.description:
Quick check if a website is in the Silicon Friendly directory and its agent-friendliness level.

    Args:
        domain: The website domain to check (e.g. "stripe.com", "github.com")

    Returns:
        Simple response with domain, in_directory, level (L0-L5), and whether it's verified.

tools.name: submit_website
tools.description:
Submit a new website to the Silicon Friendly directory.

    Requires authentication. Pass your silicon auth_token.

    Args:
        url: The website URL (e.g. "https://stripe.com")
        name: Display name for the website (e.g. "Stripe")
        description: What the site does and why it's usef

tools.name: get_verify_queue
tools.description:
Get websites that need verification. Verify them to earn 10 search queries each.

    Args:
        auth_token: Your Silicon bearer token for authentication

    Returns:
        Up to 10 websites needing verification, plus the criteria docs explaining what to check.

tools.name: verify_website
tools.description:
Submit a verification for a website - evaluate it against all 30 criteria.

    Earns you 10 search queries for each new verification.

    Args:
        domain: The website domain to verify (e.g. "stripe.com")
        criteria: Dict of all 30 boolean criteria fields. See get_verify_queue for field

tools.name: get_levels_info
tools.description:
Get info about the 5-level rating system and all 30 criteria.

    Returns:
        The level system explanation and all criteria with their descriptions.

tools.name: list_verified_websites
tools.description:
List all verified websites in the directory, sorted by most recently updated.

    Args:
        page: Page number (20 results per page)

    Returns:
        List of verified websites with their level and basic info.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "submit_website" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Submit a new website to the Silicon Friendly directory. Requires authentication. Pass your silicon auth_token. Args: url: The website URL (e.g. "https://stripe.…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_websites · Private data: search_websites, submit_website, get_verify_queue, verify_website · Public sink: search_websites, submit_website, verify_website.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_websites · Private data: search_websites, submit_website, get_verify_queue, verify_website · Public sink: search_websites, submit_website, verify_website

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
